evaluation_scope: AEM-EVOLVE governance audit data — controlled environment — EthicBit / CEMU v3.7.0+

data_sources.description: Local audit event store for governance events, HITL decisions, signing records
data_sources.lineage_coverage: All governance events from API invocation to HITL sign-off

data_sources.description: Hash records and verification receipts for all declared evidence artifacts
data_sources.lineage_coverage: 23 artifact types as declared in AEM_V1_1_ARTIFACT_ASSURANCE_CONTINUITY.md

data_sources.description: Public blockchain anchor receipts for selected artifacts
data_sources.lineage_coverage: Selected artifacts as declared in docs/anchors/

lineage_graph_scope: AEM-EVOLVE v2.0 evidence baseline — input events to signed governance receipts
data_transformation_steps: 1. Governance event received via API endpoint
2. Event validated against constitutional governance policy
3. Artifact hash computed (SHA256) and matched against AEM v1.1 manifest
4. HITL decision recorded with reviewer identity and timestamp
6. Audit record persisted to SQLiteAdapter / PostgresAdapter
7. Selected artifacts anchored via Triple Anchor
known_limitations: PostgreSQL lineage not verified against live database in this execution
Lineage scope is governance pipeline only — not training data lineage
External data source audit not conducted
